_source: Uniclass 2015 Table SL — Commercial rooms (verbatim from primary NBS Source mirror declared in sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §1)
_note: Per-entry _verification_status records sourcing. Primary NBS leaf codes recruited from SL_20_15 Administrative spaces (7 verbatim codes), SL_20_50 Commercial spaces (3 directly commercial-office relevant codes: SL_20_50_05 Auction rooms, SL_20_50_29 Financial and professional services outlets, SL_20_50_55 Motor vehicle showrooms excluded as out of scope), SL_90_20 Common spaces (waiting rooms, staff rooms, breakout, work booths), SL_90_10 Circulation (lobbies, entrance halls, vestibules), SL_90_50 Storage (vaults, secure storerooms, general storerooms), SL_35_60 Food management (kitchenettes, non-domestic kitchens), and SL_35_50 Welfare (quiet calming spaces). NBS Source page for SL_20_15 and sibling sub-groups noted 'No current codes — Contains codes that are not in use' under Uniclass v1.35 April 2026, meaning these codes remain part of the taxonomy but are classified as superseded leaf nodes; they are retained here as nbs_sourced with _inference_note flagging deprecation status. Engineering-consensus canonical_ids for modern flexible-working formats (hot_desking, phone_booth, focus_pod, collaboration_space, videoconference_room, advisor_room, safe_deposit) reference the closest NBS leaf and cite CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2, BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3 office sub-clauses, and BCO Guide to Specification 2019 (office market practice) as engineering authority. Banking sub-types (banking_hall, atm_lobby, advisor_room, safe_deposit) use SL_20_50_29 as their NBS anchor. cross_references.cibse_lg + nrm2 stay null per Sprint Z deferral; building_type_codes back-filled at Z.D.1.

entries._inference_note: NBS Source SL_20_15_61 'Open-plan offices' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 April 2026 marks SL_20_15 'No current codes — Contains codes that are not in use'; code retained as nbs_sourced per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2 (deprecated-but-present leaf nodes are transcribed verbatim and flagged).
NBS Source SL_20_15_27 'Enclosed offices' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_15 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_20_15_59 'Offices' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_15 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

Hot-desking / activity-based working is a modern flexible-office format not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_15_61 Open-plan offices. Sub-type differentiation (assigned vs unassigned desking) follows BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §2.3 (activity-based working norms) and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2 occupancy-density office classification. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.1 office illuminance targets apply.

NBS Source SL_35_50_69 'Quiet calming spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_35_50 Welfare spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_35_50 as 'Contains codes that are not in use'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

Phone booths / acoustic pods are modern small-office enclosures not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_20_98 'Work booths'. Sub-type differentiation for acoustic-rated single-person call enclosures follows BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.1 (acoustic separation criteria) and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2 task-lighting targets for enclosed workstations. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.1 applies.

Focus pods are small individual-occupancy workstation enclosures providing acoustic separation for deep-work tasks. Not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35; closest NBS leaf is SL_90_20_98 'Work booths'. Distinction from phone_booth: focus pod accommodates seated desk work; differentiation per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.1 and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2.

NBS Source SL_90_20_08 'Breakout spaces' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_90_20 as current. Collaboration space / agile working area maps to this code per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §2.3 activity-based working taxonomy.

NBS Source SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms' is the verbatim parent leaf; small/medium/large size differentiation is not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Small meeting room (up to 6 persons) sub-type per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.2 meeting room sizing taxonomy and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3 conference illuminance. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.3 applies.

NBS Source SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms' is the verbatim parent leaf; size sub-type (6–12 persons) is not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Sub-type per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.2 and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3 conference illuminance targets.

NBS Source SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms' is the verbatim parent leaf; size sub-type (12–20 persons) is not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Sub-type per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.2 and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3.

NBS Source SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms' is the verbatim parent leaf; boardroom sub-type is not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Boardroom designation per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.2 (executive specification tier) and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3 high-quality conference illuminance. Typically serves 12–30 persons with formal seating.
NBS Source SL_20_15_15 'Confidential meetings rooms' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_15 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

Video-conferencing rooms are not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms'. Sub-type differentiation (AV/VC fit-out specification tier) per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.3 VC room standards, CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3 camera-friendly colour-rendering requirements (Ra ≥90), and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.3 conference room illuminance (500 lx, UGR ≤19).

Training rooms in commercial office buildings are not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35 (educational classrooms live in SL_25). Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_15_50 'Meeting rooms'. Sub-type per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §3.2 and CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.3 training-room luminance requirements.
NBS Source SL_20_15_71 'Reception areas' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_15 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_90_20_96 'Waiting rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_10_51 'Lobbies' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_10 Circulation spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_10_27 'Entrance halls' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_10 Circulation spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).

NBS Source SL_20_55_65 'Post rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_55 Postal communications spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_55 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_20_15_73 'Reprographics rooms' is the verbatim leaf code. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_15 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

Archive / document filing rooms are not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_50_77 'Secure storerooms' (current in Uniclass v1.35). Sub-type differentiation per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §5.1 (document management storage fit-out) and BS 4971:2017 (conservation and care of archive and library collections) which defines controlled-access document store requirements.
NBS Source SL_90_50_35 'General storerooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_20_85 'Staff rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).

NBS Source SL_35_60_45 'Kitchenettes' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_35_60 Food management spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_35_60 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_90_20_16 'Customer service counter areas' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).

NBS Source SL_20_85_80 'Security offices' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_85 Security spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_85 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_90_20_80 'Social spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).

NBS Source SL_20_50_29 'Financial and professional services outlets' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Banking hall is the primary public-facing financial services space within this leaf.

ATM lobby / cash machine vestibule is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_29 'Financial and professional services outlets'. Sub-type differentiation follows BSRIA BG 6/2009 bank branch security design guidance and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.14 ATM area illuminance requirements (300 lx maintained). CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.6 financial services supplementary guidance applies.
NBS Source SL_90_50_90 'Vaults and strong rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35). Vault is the primary banking secure storage sub-type.

Safe deposit box rooms are not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35; closest NBS leaf is SL_90_50_90 'Vaults and strong rooms'. Safe deposit sub-type differentiation (client-accessible box room vs bank-operated vault) per BSRIA BG 6/2009 bank branch fit-out guidance and BS EN 1143-1:2019 (resistance to burglary for safe deposit containers).

Bank back-office / operations office spaces function as standard offices per CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2 illuminance criteria. No distinct Uniclass SL leaf exists; closest NBS leaf is SL_20_15_59 'Offices'. Sub-type differentiation (banking-sector operational context) per BCO Guide to Specification 2019 §2.1 and CIBSE Guide A 2015 §1.A2 occupancy classifications.

Financial advisor / client consultation rooms are not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_15_27 'Enclosed offices' (private interview format). Sub-type per BSRIA BG 6/2009 bank branch design guidance (client-facing interview rooms) and BS 8233:2014 §7.8 speech privacy acoustic targets for financial consultation spaces. CIBSE LG7:2015 §3.2 applies.

NBS Source SL_20_50_29 'Financial and professional services outlets' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Covers estate agents, insurance offices, building societies, and similar financial services branches.

NBS Source SL_20_50_05 'Auction rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_20_85_75 'Security control spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_85 Security spaces. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_85 as not in use; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.
NBS Source SL_90_50_27 'Equipment stores' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_20_86 'Staff workrooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_50_48 'Locker rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_20_14 'Cloakrooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
NBS Source SL_90_10_94 'Vestibules' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_10 Circulation spaces (current in Uniclass v1.35).
